topics.title: Artie Rose Roast Preparations
topics.summary: The studio prepares for a roast event featuring Artie Rose, while the hosts discuss upcoming sets, listener interactions, and logistical details with the staff.

topics.title: Studio Roast and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio hosts and guests engage in a series of interactions involving drink orders, the airing of a heated voicemail from Eric the Midget, and a roast of guest Jeff.

topics.title: Grief and Roast Comedy
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where participants discuss personal loss, the logistics of handling a parent's belongings, and transition into crude humor and drinking games during a roast.

topics.title: Pre-Roast Preparation and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio prepares for a roast by reviewing past highlights, discussing guest intoxication levels with breathalyzers, and coordinating segments before a scheduled break.

topics.title: Comedy Roast and Breathalyzer Tests
topics.summary: The studio features comedians undergoing breathalyzer tests while preparing for a comedy roast, interspersed with brief phone calls and interactions with the audience.

topics.title: Comedy Roast of Bob Levy
topics.summary: The studio hosts a roast featuring various guests who trade insults and jokes directed at Bob Levy.

topics.title: Artie Lang Roast
topics.summary: The show features a live, uncensored roast of comedian Artie Lang featuring various comedians and guests providing insults regarding his appearance, career, and personal life.

topics.title: Artie Lange Roast Comedy Special
topics.summary: The show features a series of comedians performing stand-up and roast segments, including appearances by Andrew Dice Clay and Richard Kristoff, during a live comedy event.

topics.title: Artie Lange Roast
topics.summary: The show features a comedy roast of Artie Lange involving various comedians and guests who trade insults and celebrate his career in the industry.

topics.title: Comedy Roast and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio hosts a comedy roast featuring various comedians and guests who perform jokes and interact with the audience.

topics.title: Anal Temperature Competition
topics.summary: The studio hosts and guests engage in a heated, intoxicated competition involving anal thermometers and physical altercations after a roast.

topics.title: Studio Chaos and Intoxicated Behavior
topics.summary: The studio captures a chaotic scene involving intoxicated individuals engaging in erratic behavior, including spitting, vomiting, and physical altercations, while discussing upcoming segments featuring Eric the Midget and Catherine McPhee.

topics.title: Post-Roast Show Wrap-Up
topics.summary: The studio concludes the broadcast following Artie Lange's roast, featuring interactions with callers and staff while discussing upcoming comedy shows.
